title: Mobile user changes the Lens tenant, the change in the mobile app
scenario: Mobile user switches Lens tenant and the app displays the new tenant data on the Poly Support/App page, either automatically (if accepted in-app) or after restart (if accepted externally).
steps: 1. Change the Lens tenant of a mobile user (e.g., by accepting an invite to another Lens tenant).
2. If the invite is accepted within the mobile app, verify the change is applied automatically.
3. If the invite is accepted via an external source (e.g., laptop), restart the mobile app.
4. Navigate to the Poly Support/App page.
5. Verify the app displays the new tenant data (tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID).
expected: The mobile app reflects the tenant change. If accepted within the app, the change applies automatically. If accepted externally, the change applies after restart. The Poly Support/App page shows the new tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, and app ID.
